title: rubus triangularis
intro: Rubus triangularis, also known as the thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus triangularis are attributed to its high content of antioxidants and vitamins, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rubus triangularis can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
